title: stelis lijiae
intro: Stelis lijiae, also known as the Lijia's Stelis, is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Stelis lijiae include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis lijiae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Stelis lijiae is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
